def solve(grid: list[list[int]], x: int, y: int, k: int) -> list[list[int]]:
    submatrix_rows = [grid[i][y:y + k] for i in range(x, x + k)]
    reversed_rows = submatrix_rows[::-1]

        grid[i][y:y + k] = reversed_rows[i - x]
    return grid
